name: Pet Shop of Horrors
original_name: ペットショップ・オブ・ホラーズ / ペットショップ オブ ホラーズ
overview: Welcome to the most magnificent pet shop in Chinatown! Operated by the shadowy Count D, the shop specializes in rare and hard to come by pets... but with each sale comes a contract. And if that contract is broken, watch out! Detective Orcott has linked many odd and unexplained deaths to Count D's shop. Will he solve the mystery or fall prey to it?

trailers.title: Pet Shop of Horrors Official Trailer
